title: wrightia calcicola
intro: Wrightia calcicola, also known as Indian apple, is a plant species that belongs to the Apocynaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Wrightia calcicola include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate cough and cold symptoms, and treat digestive issues. Wrightia calcicola can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and its leaves are also used in traditional Indian medicine to make various remedies.
